metadata.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 1. A YANG Model for BGP-LS, BGP-LS-VPN, and BGP-LS-SPF
2.1. L3DL and L3ND Straw man Direction
3. Applying BGP-LS Segment Routing over IPv6(SRv6) Extensions to BGP-LS-SPF
4. BGP-LS-SPF Extensions for SRv6 Policy State Synchronization
